name: 1Password
description: Premium password manager trusted by millions. Stores passwords, passkeys, secure notes, and 2FA codes across all devices with end-to-end encryption.

name: Bitwarden
description: Open-source password manager with end-to-end encryption. Sync logins across all devices with a generous free tier.

name: Cisco
description: Enterprise networking and security vendor. Offers routers, switches, firewalls, and cloud security solutions for businesses.

name: Cloudflare WARP
description: Free VPN and DNS resolver from Cloudflare. WARP replaces your ISP's DNS with 1.1.1.1 and encrypts traffic for faster, safer browsing. Completely free.

name: Have I Been Pwned
description: Check if your email or phone number has appeared in a known data breach. Covers billions of leaked credentials.

name: KeyBase
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging, file sharing, and crypto wallet. Verify identities across social platforms and communicate securely with teams.

name: Mullvad VPN
description: Privacy-first VPN that requires no account or personal info — pay anonymously. Audited, open-source clients, and a strict no-logs policy.

name: Proton Mail
description: End-to-end encrypted email based in Switzerland. Zero-knowledge architecture means even Proton can't read your messages.

name: VirusTotal
description: Scan files and URLs against 70+ antivirus engines and threat intelligence tools. Free and no account required.

name: Bitwarden
description: Open-source password manager with end-to-end encryption. Browser extensions, mobile apps, and a self-hosting option. Best free tier in the space.

name: Privacy Badger
description: EFF browser extension that automatically blocks invisible trackers. Learns as you browse without needing to maintain a blocklist.

name: Shodan
description: Search engine for internet-connected devices. Security researchers use it to find exposed servers, IoT devices, and open ports worldwide.

name: DNSChecker
description: Check DNS propagation from 150+ global locations. Instantly see if your domain has updated worldwide after changing records.

name: URLScan.io
description: Scan any URL for malicious content, phishing, and data exfiltration. See full screenshots, network requests, and threat intelligence.
